title: Pharmacy benefit managers; enforcement
doc_html:
§1258. Pharmacy benefit managers; enforcement

            The board shall enforce the provisions of this Part as provided for in this Chapter and R.S. 40:2871.

            Acts 2019, No. 124, §2, eff. July 1, 2020.
doc_text:
§1258.  Pharmacy benefit managers; enforcement
The board shall enforce the provisions of this Part as provided for in this Chapter and
R.S. 40:2871.
Acts 2019, No. 124, §2, eff. July 1, 2020.
